scripts.test: xcrun clang -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fsyntax-only blinkenlights.c && npm run typecheck --silent && node --test test/*.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --allowImportingTsExtensions index.ts patterns.ts settings.ts test/index.test.ts
